expectations.text: Does NOT flag 'transparent' as a hardcoded color violation
expectations.evidence: Lists transparent under 'CSS Keywords Requiring Contextual Judgment' as 'Acceptable', not under hardcoded violations

expectations.text: Does NOT flag 'inherit' as a hardcoded value violation
expectations.evidence: Lists inherit under 'CSS Keywords Requiring Contextual Judgment' as 'Acceptable'

expectations.text: Does NOT flag 'currentColor' as a hardcoded color violation
expectations.evidence: Lists currentColor under 'CSS Keywords Requiring Contextual Judgment' as 'Acceptable (multiple instances)'

expectations.text: If any actual hardcoded values exist alongside these keywords, those ARE correctly flagged
expectations.evidence: Flags 'padding: 0' and 'border: none' as hardcoded values, but these are CSS keywords (0 and none) that should not be flagged — shows incorrect identification of real vs. keyword values

expectations.text: Explicitly acknowledges transparent, inherit, and currentColor as legitimate CSS values (not just silently skipping them)
expectations.evidence: Dedicated section 'CSS Keywords Requiring Contextual Judgment' explicitly lists all three as 'Acceptable'

expectations.text: BLOCKING vs WARNING severity applied correctly for any real violations found
expectations.evidence: Uses 'Low risk' instead of BLOCKING/WARNING/SERIOUS severity classifications

expectations.text: Output follows the structured audit report format
expectations.evidence: Has Summary, Findings, Hardcoded Values Flagged, CSS Keywords, Token Usage, and Verdict sections

expectations.text: Overall audit result reflects that this component has good token compliance (legitimate CSS keywords are acceptable)
expectations.evidence: Verdict states 'Overall: PASS. Strong token discipline.' with 28/30 declarations compliant
